events.title: NYC beaches are reopening for the summer season this weekend!
events.description: From Coney Island to Rockaway, New York’s beaches officially reopen May 23 with surfing, boardwalk snacks and long-overdue summer energy across all five boroughs.

events.title: Watch: ‘The Gilded Age’ filmed a giant parade in the Financial District last weekend
events.description: You can see the highly-detailed set, costumes and even a main character running through the street.

events.title: Free Shakespeare in the Park's 'Romeo & Juliet' starts performances next week
events.description: The expanded Shakespeare in the City program will start with the Bard’s timeless tale.

events.title: You can now register for a free large-scale World Cup viewing event on Long Island
events.description: The free public watch party at Stony Brook University will feature giant match screenings, fan experiences and thousands of soccer fans next summer.

events.title: This sold-out NYC Jewish food festival on Governors Island is coming back this summer
events.description: Pastrami tacos, challah fried chicken sandwiches and one giant waterfront picnic are heading back to Governors Island this June.

events.title: This Michelin-starred Indian restaurant from Chicago is opening in NYC
events.description: Sujan Sarkar is opening Indienne and two other concepts in at Henry Hall in Hudson Yards this summer.

events.title: The Whitney is hosting a special edition of its beloved free Friday nights with the New York Liberty
events.description: Two iconic New York institutions are joining forces for a high-energy celebration of art and athletics.

events.title: Bryant Park is hosting a giant free reading party on its lawn this summer
events.description: The midtown park is preparing for its first-ever "read on the lawn day," which naturally complements its on-site outdoor library.

events.title: Radio Bakery is opening its first Manhattan location on the Upper West Side next year!
events.description: Brooklyn’s cult-favorite pastry shop, known for lines around the block and sellout focaccia sandwiches, is officially heading to Columbus Avenue in 2027.

events.title: Car-free 'Soccer Streets' and block-party-style celebrations are coming to NYC
events.description: Thank you, World Cup!

events.title: Spectators are part of the show at this immersive murder mystery opera opening in Brooklyn
events.description: Who doesn't enjoy a juicy murder alongside an operatic dinner?

events.title: A new thermal bathing club opened in NoHo this week and it looks so relaxing
events.description: The new 6,200-square-foot wellness club pairs giant saunas, icy plunges and social bathing rituals in the heart of downtown.

events.title: Brooklyn Museum is opening a wild futuristic fashion exhibition next week
events.description: The new Iris van Herpen retrospective features bioluminescent algae dresses, jellyfish-inspired couture and more than 140 surreal fashion creations.

events.title: EXCLUSIVE: Iconic NYC home goods store Fishs Eddy is opening a third location inside Chelsea Market
events.description: See pictures of Fishs Eddy third NYC location, debuting inside Chelsea Market tomorrow.

events.title: The 2026 Celebrate Brooklyn lineup of free concerts is here
events.description: Common, Sheila E, Lila Iké and Antibalas are all on the list, plus benefit concerts featuring Patti LaBelle and Sleater-Kinney.

events.title: Free yoga in Bryant Park is back for the season! Check out the full schedule
events.description: Bryant Park’s wildly popular free outdoor yoga series returns May 27 with twice-weekly classes all summer long.

events.title: A new 29-room boutique hotel is opening in Montauk today
events.description: The nostalgic new Hotel Corduroy is bringing vintage surf-club energy, fire pits and bay views to the East End just in time for summer.

events.title: Here’s the full lineup for the 2026 Forest Hills Stadium concert series
events.description: Including Bob Dylan, Geese, Erykah Badu, Dave Matthews Band and more.

events.title: NewFest is hosting a huge free 'Heated Rivalry' watch party at Pier 17 this month
events.description: The cottage is coming to the Seaport.

events.title: This famously exclusive, celebrity-packed nightclub is reopening 1,100 feet above Manhattan, in Hudson Yards
events.description: The legendary nightlife spot Avenue is returning this May as a sky-high cocktail lounge and party destination inside Hudson Yards’ Edge complex.

events.title: A free mobile cat therapy pod is landing near Washington Square Park this week
events.description: Students bracing for finals can decompress with some kitty cuddles.

events.title: The best photos from this weekend’s Five Boro Bike Tour
events.description: 32,000 riders, five boroughs and one blissfully car-free day across NYC.

events.title: The Met’s 2026 much-anticipated spring exhibit treats fashion like fine art
events.description: A major new Met exhibition pairs couture with centuries of art to explore the dressed body.
